items.title: Billionaire David Tepper Sells These 5 Stocks to Buy This 1 Stock
items.description: David Tepper is one of the most successful hedge fund managers in history, with a net worth of ~$23.7 billion. He’s been selling UnitedHealth (NYSE:UNH), Intel (NASDAQ:INTC), Alibaba (NYSE:BABA), Vistra (NYSE:VST), and Micron (NASDAQ:MU). He’s piling into a lesser-known stock instead called Whirlpool (NYSE:WHR), and we’ll look into why in a bit. Tepper is the ... Billionaire David Tepper Sells These 5 Stocks to Buy This 1 Stock

items.title: Brokers Suggest Investing in UnitedHealth (UNH): Read This Before Placing a Bet
items.description: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), UnitedHealth (UNH) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
